scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 100 Trying [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Supported: timer,100rel Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=1 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> P-Asserted-Identity: <sip:81002001@rwtrunk.com> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=ptime:20 a=label:20 a=recvonly m=audio [media_port+2] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=ptime:20 a=label:10 a=recvonly m=video 0 RTP/AVP 0 │ a=inactive │ m=video 0 RTP/AVP 0 │ a=inactive

SIP/2.0 400 Bad request │ From: "3000054, CI" <sip:3000054@ci.com>;tag=7af7e998a641eaba1f050568d886e │ To: <sip:172.16.10.128:5060;transport=tcp>;tag=error │ CSeq: 6065 UPDATE │ RTP Call-ID: 54d9d57fd02a8619a417932fa9ba2a54 │ 8 1 Via: SIP/2.0/TCP 172.16.32.11:5060;branch=z9hG4bK-s1632-000881472221-1--s1632-;rport=12092 │ Content-Length: 0
